ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the stock data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adjclose" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded during the day */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "adjclose_1" REAL /* Adjusted closing price from the previous day */,
  "true_adjclose_1" REAL /* True adjusted closing price from the previous day */,
  "buy_profit" REAL /* Profit from buying the stock */,
  "sell_profit" REAL /* Profit from selling the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of trading hours */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of account creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last account update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol included in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of investment report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_pdf" TEXT /* URL or file path of the PDF report */,
  "report_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the report generation process */,
  "share_with" TEXT /* List of users or roles the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who manages the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "initial_balance" REAL /* Initial balance of the portfolio */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_contents" (
  "portfolio_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio content */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol included in the portfolio */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_contents_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_contents_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted closing price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol related to the news */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume change) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set up */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per stock in the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  "brokerage_firm" TEXT /* Brokerage firm through which the transaction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol included in the index */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of the index (e.g., value-weighted, price-weighted) */,
  "index_description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indices_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)
